title: Special Convening of ACE’s Faith-Based Commission Addresses “Learning to Disagree Better”
summary_en: A June 8 convening of ACE’s Commission on Faith-Based Colleges and Universities will bring together leaders to discuss the timely topic of how faith-based institutions can contribute to improving civic dialogue.
title_cn: 美国教育委员会信仰事务委员会特别会议研讨“学会更妥善处理分歧”

title: ACE Names 31 Emerging Higher Education Leaders to ACE Fellows Program
summary_en: ACE has selected 31 emerging college and university leaders for the 2026-2027 class of the ACE Fellows Program.
title_cn: 美国教育理事会遴选31名高等教育领域新晋领导者入选ACE会士项目

title: ACE Webinar to Examine Mental Health Policy and Practice
summary_en: Register now for a May 27 ACE webinar that will bring together leading voices in mental health advocacy and trauma-informed care to explore the critical intersection of policy, practice, and student wellbeing.
title_cn: 美国教育委员会将举办网络研讨会研讨心理健康政策与实践
